objective: Priority 1 rotor gradient shape + flux barrier exploration
protocol: Run a 45 degree, 1 degree sweep first for each variant.
Reject variants that fail FEMM geometry/material checks.
For any positive variant, run at least medium/fine/very-fine mesh convergence before accepting.
Do not claim performance from auto-mesh-only or coarse-only results.

variants.name: teb_b_3deg_132_145
variants.purpose: Trailing-edge air-gap barrier, middle starting point.

variants.name: teb_c_4deg_130_145
variants.purpose: Trailing-edge air-gap barrier, wider near-air-gap slot.

variants.name: teb_d_3deg_126_145
variants.purpose: Trailing-edge air-gap barrier, deeper middle-width slot.

variants.name: asym_a_lead1p5_trail142
variants.purpose: Asymmetric magnet with mild leading extension and mild trailing retreat.

variants.name: asym_b_lead2p0_trail140
variants.purpose: Asymmetric magnet middle starting point; current best first-screen direction.

variants.name: asym_c_lead2p5_trail138
variants.purpose: Stronger asymmetric magnet with more leading bias and trailing retreat.

variants.name: asym_d_lead3p0_trail137
variants.purpose: Aggressive asymmetric magnet; use as the edge of the first shape search.

variants.name: p1_barrier_5deg_core
variants.purpose: Substantial rotor-core air barriers to interrupt return flux paths.

variants.name: p1_barrier_8deg_core
variants.purpose: Wider rotor-core air barriers for a stronger cancellation falsification test.

variants.name: p1_forward_biased_cap
variants.purpose: Leading-edge outer pole cap intended to strengthen forward pull and weaken trailing pull.

variants.name: p1_partial_halbach_15deg
variants.purpose: Partial Halbach-style magnetization bias to steer flux toward the EML side.

variants.name: p1_barrier_plus_halbach
variants.purpose: Combined substantial barriers and partial Halbach bias; test only after individual variants solve.
